storage.sqlite_policy: SQLite is explicitly disallowed as authoritative storage.

phases.title: Phase 0: Project control files

Document PostgreSQL as the only authoritative storage layer

phases.title: Phase 1: PostgreSQL + schema + migrations
completed: Add Dockerized PostgreSQL infrastructure
Add open-core/db/ migration layout
Create initial schema migrations
Add repository interfaces
Add local database setup documentation
Add migration verification workflow
Add migration metadata tracking
Strengthen schema verification for required schemas, tables, columns, indexes, unique constraints, and migration hashes
Add PostgreSQL-only connection/config abstraction
Replace docs/FOLDER_STRUCTURE.md mojibake tree with ASCII tree

phases.title: Pre-Phase 2: migration runner hardening
completed: Harden open-core/scripts/postgres_local.ps1 so migration metadata is recorded immediately after each successful migration, matching recorded migrations are skipped, hash mismatches fail clearly, and failed migrations stop without silently leaving untracked partial state

phases.title: Phase 2: data collection + validation
completed: Add importable data collection and data validation package skeletons
Define provider, request, raw observation, normalized market data, instrument metadata, and collection run contracts
Define the abstract crypto market data provider interface
Register Binance, OKX, Bybit, and Coinbase as planned provider specifications without clients or credentials
Define validation, reconciliation, quarantine, and dataset promotion contracts
Add offline construction, registry, abstract-interface, and Python compile checks
Add deterministic canonical JSON and SHA-256 source hashing utilities
Add explicit UTC requirement and coercion guards that reject naive datetimes by default
Add conservative simple-pair symbol normalization helpers
Add an offline-only OHLCV sample provider restricted to public-safe fixtures under open-core/data/sample
Add synthetic OHLCV fixture data and offline hashing, UTC, symbol, and provider tests
Normalize sample-provider OHLCV observations into Decimal-based UTC NormalizedBar records with conservative symbols and complete provenance
Add deterministic missing-bar, duplicate timestamp, non-monotonic timestamp, OHLC, volume, and partial-candle checks
Build hashed in-memory validation reports and deterministic quarantine reason mappings without persistence
Add offline normalization, validation, policy, quarantine, and report-hash tests guarded against network use
Add the data-quality quarantine decisions migration and catalog verification coverage
Add PostgreSQL repositories for raw observations, validation reports, checks, validated bars, and quarantine decisions
Add domain-to-storage mappings that preserve source IDs, source hashes, report hashes, tolerance hashes, and provenance
Add the offline accepted/rejected OHLCV persistence flow with transactional writes and deterministic quarantine decisions
Add public-safe offline persistence tests and verification coverage
Return existing validation report IDs on uniqueness conflicts and define validated-bar queries with end-exclusive time windows
Add an injectable HTTP transport boundary with an optional standard-library implementation
Implement Binance Spot public /api/v3/klines request building and 12-field response parsing
Generate deterministic hashed RawObservation records that flow through existing normalization and validation
Add fully offline fake-transport tests and an explicitly disabled public-network smoke script
Implement configurable deterministic offline OHLCV reconciliation across provider datasets
Emit stable missing-coverage, price, volume, extra-bar, and close-time validation results
Build deterministic reconciliation IDs, status, metrics, and UTC provenance without persistence
Add fully offline tests for policies, tolerances, ordering, input guards, and network isolation
Verify the current OKX V5 public GET /api/v5/market/history-candles contract against official documentation
Implement an injectable public-only OKX historical OHLCV adapter with conservative symbol and UTC timeframe mappings
Add bounded backward pagination, half-open filtering, cursor-progress guards, deterministic provenance, and documented finality parsing
Add fully offline OKX request, parsing, pagination, hashing, normalization, validation, and socket-isolation tests
Add ordered reconciliation summary and child-check PostgreSQL tables with indexes and idempotency constraints
Expose deterministic reconciliation configuration, dataset, and result hashes in the domain contract
Add reconciliation row mappings and parameterized PostgreSQL repository methods that return database-selected conflict IDs
Add atomic reconciliation persistence with child-write rollback and a unified OHLCV pipeline repository
Extend schema verification and offline tests for reconciliation tables, columns, indexes, constraints, migration hashes, mappings, and transactions
Add typed provider-neutral orchestration for collection, normalization, single-source validation, and cross-source reconciliation
Add explicit fail-fast and partial-provider policies without treating one provider as successful reconciliation
Add one outer PostgreSQL transaction boundary for optional raw, validation, bar/quarantine, and reconciliation persistence
Add a fixture-default CLI with separately gated bounded public-network and PostgreSQL persistence modes
Add offline Binance plus OKX integration tests for success, failures, quarantine, mismatches, persistence, determinism, and socket isolation
Add one canonical record-level OHLCV validation gate shared by reconciliation and persistence
Exclude rejected bars from reconciliation and expose provider accepted/rejected eligibility outcomes
Add quality-aware pipeline status semantics for succeeded, partial, and failed runs
Propagate database-selected validation report IDs to accepted bars, quarantine rows, and persistence summaries
Reject validation report identity conflicts when stored and incoming report hashes differ
